bird.name: 贝氏辉亭鸟
bird.summary: 贝氏辉亭鸟（台湾作貝氏別墅鳥，学名：Sericulus bakeri），是雀形目园丁鸟科的一种鸟类。 贝氏辉亭鸟体重约176.46克，翼长约135.5毫米，嘴峰长约29.1毫米，喙宽度约8毫米，喙厚度约9.2毫米，跗蹠长约41.5毫米，尾长约89.1毫米。贝氏辉亭鸟在其分布区内…

locations.name: 阿德爾伯特山脈
locations.summary: 阿德爾伯特山脈是巴布亞新幾內亞的山脈，位於該國中北部，由馬當省負責管轄，最高點海拔高度1,716米，該山脈是超過700種鳥類的棲息地。

relations.subject: 贝氏辉亭鸟
relations.evidence: The fire-maned bowerbird (Sericulus bakeri) is a medium-sized, approximately long, bowerbird that inhabits and endemic to the forests of the Adelbert Range in Papua New Guinea.{{cite journal |last1=Diamond |first1=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K

relations.subject: 贝氏辉亭鸟
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss and limited range, the fire-maned bowerbird is evaluated as near threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
